det_check_template:
proof fn det_alloc_page_4k_for_new_container(pre_self_: PageAllocator, post1_self_: PageAllocator, r1: (PagePtr, Tracked<PagePerm4k>), post2_self_: PageAllocator, r2: (PagePtr, Tracked<PagePerm4k>))
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.free_pages_4k.len() > 0),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.free_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.free_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_4k().remove(r1.0))
            &&& (post1_self_.free_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_1g())
            &&& (post1_self_.allocated_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k().insert(r1.0))
            &&& (post1_self_.allocated_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.allocated_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_1g())
            &&& (post1_self_.mapped_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_4k())
            &&& (post1_self_.mapped_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.mapped_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_1g())
            &&& (post1_self_.container_map_4k@ =~= pre_self_.container_map_4k@.insert(r1.0, Set::empty()))
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_2m@.insert(r1.0, Set::empty()) =~= post1_self_.container_map_2m@)
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_1g@.insert(r1.0, Set::empty()) =~= post1_self_.container_map_1g@)
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr|
                post1_self_.page_is_mapped(p) ==> post1_self_.page_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_mappings(p)
                    && post1_self_.page_io_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_io_mappings(p))
            &&& (r1.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r1.1@.addr() == r1.0)
            &&& (pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k().contains(r1.0) == false)
            &&& (forall|c: ContainerPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c)]
                pre_self_.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c) ==> post1_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c)
                    =~= pre_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c))
            &&& (page_ptr_valid(r1.0))
            &&& (pre_self_.free_pages_4k().contains(r1.0))
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr| #![auto] post1_self_.page_is_mapped(p) == pre_self_.page_is_mapped(p))
            &&& (post1_self_.free_pages_4k.len() == pre_self_.free_pages_4k.len() - 1)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container_owned_pages(r1.0) == Set::<PagePtr>::empty())
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.free_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_2m())
            &&& (post2_self_.free_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_4k().remove(r2.0))
            &&& (post2_self_.free_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_1g())
            &&& (post2_self_.allocated_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k().insert(r2.0))
            &&& (post2_self_.allocated_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_2m())
            &&& (post2_self_.allocated_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_1g())
            &&& (post2_self_.mapped_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_4k())
            &&& (post2_self_.mapped_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_2m())
            &&& (post2_self_.mapped_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_1g())
            &&& (post2_self_.container_map_4k@ =~= pre_self_.container_map_4k@.insert(r2.0, Set::empty()))
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_2m@.insert(r2.0, Set::empty()) =~= post2_self_.container_map_2m@)
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_1g@.insert(r2.0, Set::empty()) =~= post2_self_.container_map_1g@)
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr|
                post2_self_.page_is_mapped(p) ==> post2_self_.page_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_mappings(p)
                    && post2_self_.page_io_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_io_mappings(p))
            &&& (r2.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r2.1@.addr() == r2.0)
            &&& (pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k().contains(r2.0) == false)
            &&& (forall|c: ContainerPtr|
                #![trigger post2_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c)]
                pre_self_.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c) ==> post2_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c)
                    =~= pre_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c))
            &&& (page_ptr_valid(r2.0))
            &&& (pre_self_.free_pages_4k().contains(r2.0))
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr| #![auto] post2_self_.page_is_mapped(p) == pre_self_.page_is_mapped(p))
            &&& (post2_self_.free_pages_4k.len() == pre_self_.free_pages_4k.len() - 1)
            &&& (post2_self_.get_container_owned_pages(r2.0) == Set::<PagePtr>::empty())
        }) ==> det_alloc_page_4k_for_new_container_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
